title: Now — current Dispatch
surface: Stratechery-style 'this week' index — the current dispatch with in-flight initiatives, writing/reading, and a right-rail system log
summary: Stitch-generated surface that has no v2 plan equivalent. Maps closest to Thesis B home — if D1 lands on Thesis B, this likely replaces or fuses with home. If D1 lands on Thesis A, this surface is out-of-scope and should be archived or repurposed as About sub-page.

strategy.decision: Stand up as a Stitch-sourced candidate; pin disposition to D1.
strategy.why: Stitch produced a Thesis-B-aligned 'current Dispatch' surface that the v2 plan only sketched. Bringing it in lets us A/B test the Dispatch concept visually before D1 lands.
strategy.shipped: No equivalent in v1 — v1 home is a chronological post list.
strategy.gap: If D1=B, this surface is canonical and home.html becomes a 'static landing' OR is removed; if D1=A, this is out of scope.
strategy.question: Does D1 land on Thesis B (Dispatch as a publication), making this the primary surface?
